nodes.name: continue.md
nodes.summary: Auto-continue prompt template for the Archon Batch SDD pipeline, guiding agents through multi-step spec/implement/review cycles across sessions. Provides step-by-step instructions for reading state, running the SDD pipeline on pending plans, and generating handoffs.

nodes.name: handoff-template.md
nodes.summary: Handoff template auto-generated at session end to capture where work left off for the Batch SDD pipeline. Provides human-readable context summarizing session progress, completed work, and next steps.

nodes.name: state.yaml
nodes.summary: YAML state file tracking sprint progress for the Google ADK improvements batch run, containing batch metadata, sprint definitions, and session records. Serves as the source of truth for the auto-continue pipeline.
